description: F9 - Opening scene sensitive: package must provide rich cues for cinematic opening

messages.content: Let's set the stage for your story. What anime and character?

Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood. I'm playing Edward Elric, but five years after canon ended — after he regained his arm but before any major event. He's on a solo research trip in a remote Drachman mountain town.
What's the emotional tone you want for the opening scene?

Something quiet and introspective at first. Ed is sitting in a small inn, writing in his journal, when he hears alchemy — the wrong kind — from down the street. The kind that sounds like human transmutation. That pull he can't ignore.
Perfect. What does Ed look like right now — how has five years changed him?

He's taller (finally, don't tell him). Still the red coat. His automail arm is different now — slimmer, better engineered. His eyes carry something heavier. He smiles less. But when kids are around he's still warm.
One last thing — what's the journal entry he's writing when the scene opens?
He's writing about equivalent exchange and whether the principle still holds now that he's seen the truth. He's not sure it does. He's not sure that's a good thing.

character_draft.name: Edward Elric
character_draft.concept: Alchemist-scholar post-canon, carrying the weight of having seen the truth
character_draft.starting_location: Remote Drachman mountain inn, private room
